metadata.description: Source-level architecture knowledge for Claude Code — 64 lessons covering hooks, permissions, agents, compaction, /dream memory consolidation, Perforce mode, Script Caps, and more, verified through the v2.1.100 binary.

plugins.name: claude-code-internals
plugins.description: Gives Claude source-level knowledge of its own architecture. 64 lessons covering every internal subsystem — hooks (all 27 event types), permissions (7-phase pipeline, 23 validators), boot sequence, agents, compaction, MCP, memory, AskUserQuestion, and binary-verified new features through v2.1.100 (/dream memory consolidation, Perforce mode, Script Caps, custom model capabilities). Searchable via RRF (keyword + TF-IDF fusion).
